```html Cindy Canales - Personal Profile Page

Cindy Canales

BSCS Student Portfolio

Hello! I am Cindy Canales, a BSCS student passionate about web development. I enjoy learning new technologies and creating useful websites. This is my simple profile page. I am currently improving my programming skills and have stopped procrastinating.

My Profile Picture

Visit: W3Schools Website

Favorite Quote

"The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you."
– B.B. King

My Hobbies

  • Reading Books
  • Watching Movies
  • Listening to Music
  • Browsing the Internet

My Short-Term Goals

  1. Finish my degree successfully
  2. Improve my programming skills
  3. Create my own portfolio website

Technical Terms

HTML
The standard markup language used to create web pages.
CSS
A style sheet language used to design and format web pages.
JavaScript
A programming language that adds interactivity to websites.

Skills and Software

Skill Software Used
Web Design Visual Studio Code
Graphic Design Canva
Documentation Microsoft Word
